title: Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple
tagline: Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Akkur Thanthondreeswarar Temple(ஆக்கூர் தான்தோன்றீசுவரர் கோயில் ]) is a Hindu temple located at Akkur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Akkur Thanthondreeswarar Temple(ஆக்கூர் தான்தோன்றீசுவரர் கோயில் ]) is a Hindu temple located at Akkur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called as Thanthondriappar. His consort is known as Valnedunkanni.

topPlaces.name: Akkur, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Akkur is a small town in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Mayiladuthurai town. Akkur is located 260 km from the state capital, Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Manjalar River
topPlaces.description: Manjalar originates from Palani Hills, Tamil Nadu and runs towards east and joins the Vaigai River near Koottathu. There are nine anicuts and nine tanks in this sub-basin.

topPlaces.name: Thalachangadu
topPlaces.description: Thalachangadu is a historical village located in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India, on the bank of the Cauvery River. Its southern boundary is the Rajendran Channel, on the north side is the Cauvery River, on the east side is MelaPerumPallam and on the western side is Natraja Pillai Chavadi.

topPlaces.name: Thalai Sanga Nanmathiyam
topPlaces.description: The Naanmadiya Perumal Temple (also called Thalachanga Nanmathiyam) is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thalaichangadu, near Akkur in Mayiladuthurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Nanmadiya Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Talaichanga Nachiar.

topPlaces.name: Sayavaneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Sayavaneswarar Temple or Chaayaavaneswarar is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirusaikkadu [or Thiruchaykkadu or Chaayavanam] near Kaveripoompattinam or Puhar, Mayiladuthurai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is the Hindu god Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Ponsei-Kidarankondan
topPlaces.description: Ponsei Thirunanipalli is one of the villages of Kidarankondan panchayat. It is located in Mayiladuthurai district and state of Tamil Nadu, under Poompuhar Assembly Constituency and Mayiladuthurai parliamentary Constituency.

topPlaces.name: Thirukkadaiyur
topPlaces.description: Thirukkadaiyur (Thirukadavur) is a village on the east coast of Tamil Nadu, about 300 km south of Chennai and 15 km north of Karaikal. The history of the village is associated with the legends of Markandeya and Abirami Pattar.

topPlaces.name: Ponsei Natrunaiyappar Temple
topPlaces.description: Natrunaiyappar Temple(நற்றுணையப்பர் ஆலயம்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the village of Ponsei or Thirunanipalli (Chola Nadu - South of Kaveri), Mayiladuthurai district, East-Central Tamil Nadu, South India. It's one of the holy place "Tevaram has been sung on the primary god of the Shiva (Paadal Petra sthalam)".

items.note: Akkur is a small town in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from Mayiladuthurai town. Akkur is located 260 km from the state capital, Chennai.
Manjalar originates from Palani Hills, Tamil Nadu and runs towards east and joins the Vaigai River near Koottathu. There are nine anicuts and nine tanks in this sub-basin.

Thalachangadu is a historical village located in Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India, on the bank of the Cauvery River. Its southern boundary is the Rajendran Channel, on the north side is the Cauvery River, on the east side is MelaPerumPallam and on the western side is Natraja Pillai Chavadi.

The Naanmadiya Perumal Temple (also called Thalachanga Nanmathiyam) is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thalaichangadu, near Akkur in Mayiladuthurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Nanmadiya Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Talaichanga Nachiar.

The Sayavaneswarar Temple or Chaayaavaneswarar is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirusaikkadu [or Thiruchaykkadu or Chaayavanam] near Kaveripoompattinam or Puhar, Mayiladuthurai in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is the Hindu god Shiva.

Ponsei Thirunanipalli is one of the villages of Kidarankondan panchayat. It is located in Mayiladuthurai district and state of Tamil Nadu, under Poompuhar Assembly Constituency and Mayiladuthurai parliamentary Constituency.

Thirukkadaiyur (Thirukadavur) is a village on the east coast of Tamil Nadu, about 300 km south of Chennai and 15 km north of Karaikal. The history of the village is associated with the legends of Markandeya and Abirami Pattar.

Natrunaiyappar Temple(நற்றுணையப்பர் ஆலயம்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the village of Ponsei or Thirunanipalli (Chola Nadu - South of Kaveri), Mayiladuthurai district, East-Central Tamil Nadu, South India. It's one of the holy place "Tevaram has been sung on the primary god of the Shiva (Paadal Petra sthalam)".

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (123 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aakkoor Thanthondreeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Akkur, Mayiladuthurai, Manjalar River, Thalachangadu, Thalai Sanga Nanmathiyam, Sayavaneswarar Temple.
